caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing 24 kt winds with 6.4 ft wave heights and a 53% rain probability, while Grand Cayman has 20 kt winds. I expect these conditions to impact cruise ship operations in the Eastern Caribbean, particularly around St. Thomas, with less severe conditions in the Western Caribbean near Grand Cayman.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Weather Calm
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing less than 10% rain probability with winds of 12 kt and wave heights of 3.8 ft, while Mykonos has a bit stronger winds at 18 kt. I expect these calm conditions to prevail across the Mediterranean, with the dominant swell direction from the west and no significant weather threats to ports like Cadiz and Mykonos today.
